string.templatelib/Interpolation/format_.name: format_spec
string.templatelib/Interpolation/format_.description: The format specification to apply to the value. The format_spec is an optional, arbitrary string used as the format specification to present the value: >>> t'{1 + 2:.2f}'.interpolations[0].format_spec '.2f' Note Unlike f-strings, where format specifications are applied automatically via the format() protocol, the expected behavior with t-strings is that code that processes the interpolation will decide how to interpret and whether to apply the format specification. As a result, format_spec va...
